summary.narrative: Across his 2022 campaign 'America at Its Best' agenda, Lee's budget- and legislation-anchored commitments were largely delivered: the $1B TISA education investment, $500M CTE funding, 100 additional THP troopers, the $100M Violent Crime Intervention Fund, a Rainy Day Fund exceeding its $1.8B target, the Transportation Modernization Act, TCAT infrastructure investment, and a grocery tax suspension all show documented enactment, frequently exceeding stated dollar figures. The Multi-Agency Law Enforcement Training Academy reached groundbreaking but completion is unconfirmed, and the TennCare adult dental benefit was proposed but its enactment is not documented in the supplied material. Permitless carry was passed, though gun-rights advocates contest whether it constitutes full constitutional carry.
summary.grade_rationale: Most tracked promises are specific, measurable commitments (clarity 4–5) carried out through Lee's budget and a legislature he drove, with documented delivery at or above target levels; a minority remain partial (MALETA construction) or unverified (adult dental), and one is contested in scope. The pattern is a high rate of documented delivery on quantitatively specified, championed-and-signed commitments.

data_gaps: Several promises are 2022 budget/State-of-State items where the official's role is championed-and-signed (0.8), not unilateral; the legislature was a necessary co-actor throughout. Adult dental benefit (c9) lacks delivery confirmation — flagged LIMITED EVIDENCE; CTE $500M relies on a single corroborating mention. Constitutional carry is CONTESTED by gun-rights groups (c181, c182, c109) who argue Lee did not deliver true constitutional carry. Many delivery actions span both the prior term (pre-2023) and current term; verification records were not filtered by term in this material, so reviewers should confirm term-window attribution for pre-2023 actions.

provisional_status.display: Grade is record-to-date — term in progress, 85.7% elapsed (as of 2026-06-22). It will change as the term continues.
provisional_status.note: Distinct from any per-promise 'PROVISIONAL (early-term)' flag in scorecard.card_flags, which concerns a single promise's own deadline, not the term's completeness.
